product_overview: Saizu is a lightweight, self-hosted service that analyzes npm packages and public GitHub repositories to report real-world package footprint (gzip size, install size, file/type breakdown, dependency tree) and produce badges and comparisons without local installs.
core_goals: Provide fast, accurate analysis of npm packages and public GitHub repositories (including monorepos) without local tooling.
Expose a concise JSON API and badge endpoints for integration into CI, READMEs, and developer workflows.
Offer side-by-side comparison and cached results for low-latency repeated queries while keeping the system zero-dependency and easy to self-host.
Enable observability and safe ephemeral analysis by using temporary install directories and an in-memory TTL cache.

features.name: API Discovery
features.description: Return API version, base URL, and a machine-readable list of available endpoints and targetFormats.
user_flows: GET /api/v1 -> Receive 200 with JSON { version, baseUrl, endpoints, targetFormats }

features.name: Health Check
features.description: Lightweight endpoint reporting service status, current version and uptime.

features.name: NPM Package Analysis
features.description: Analyze a published npm package (supports scoped packages) and return metrics such as gzip size, install size, file counts and module/type detection.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/package/lodash -> Receive 200 with JSON { source: 'npm', packageName: 'lodash', packageVersion, description, license, gzipSize, installSize, fileCount, typeBreakdown, dependencies, hasESM, hasCJS, hasTypes, downloadTime, cachedAt }
GET /api/v1/package/@tanstack/react-query -> Receive 200 with JSON { source: 'npm', packageName: '@tanstack/react-query', ... }

features.name: GitHub Repo Analysis
features.description: Analyze a public GitHub repository (optionally with branch and subpath) using the same pipeline as npm analysis to report pre-publish package footprint.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/repo/facebook/react -> Receive 200 with JSON { source: 'github', owner: 'facebook', repo: 'react', branch, subpath: null, commit, ...packageInfo, npmComparison, cachedAt }
GET /api/v1/repo/kode-kult/saizu?branch=main&subpath=packages/cli -> Receive 200 with analysis of the specified subpath

features.name: Package Comparison
features.description: Compare two targets (npm package names or GitHub owner/repo) side-by-side and return per-metric diffs.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/compare?a=lodash&b=react -> Receive 200 with JSON { a: packageResult, b: packageResult, diff: { gzipSize, installSize, dependencyCount, smaller } }
GET /api/v1/compare?a=github:kode-kult/saizu&b=@tanstack/react-query -> Receive 200 with JSON { a: ..., b: ..., diff: ... }

features.name: Internal Package Analysis API (legacy UI routes)
features.description: Legacy endpoints used by the server-rendered UI to analyze non-scoped and scoped npm packages.

features.name: Badge Generation
features.description: Generate SVG badges for package gzip or install size (supports scoped packages and GitHub owner/repo).
user_flows: GET /badge/lodash -> Receive 200 image/svg+xml (badge showing gzip or install size)

features.name: Web UI
features.description: Server-rendered landing page with search, analysis results and comparison UI accessible from the root path.
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with HTML page that includes search, analyze and compare UI

features.name: Static Assets
features.description: Serve fonts, images and CSS with appropriate cache headers for the web UI and badges.
user_flows: GET /fonts/inter.woff2 -> Receive 200 font/woff2 with Cache-Control headers
GET /bg.png -> Receive 200 image/png with Cache-Control headers

features.name: Rate Limiting
features.description: IP-based rate limiting to protect the analysis pipeline (60 requests per minute, localhost bypass).
user_flows: GET /api/v1/health from 127.0.0.1 -> Receive 200 (rate limit bypass for localhost)
Send 60x GET /api/v1/health from IP 203.0.113.5 -> Receive 200 for each request
Send 61st GET /api/v1/health from IP 203.0.113.5 -> Receive 429 { error: 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED' }

features.name: In-memory Cache (TTL)
features.description: Cache analysis results in-process to return hot results in <50ms; cache entries expire after TTL and are lost on restart.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/package/lodash -> Receive 200 (cold analysis, cachedAt set, analysis performed)
GET /api/v1/package/lodash -> Receive 200 (cache hit, return cached result with same cachedAt, <50ms)
Restart server (cache cleared) -> GET /api/v1/package/lodash -> Receive 200 (cold analysis again)

features.name: Gzip Compression (response optimization)
features.description: Server compresses text responses (HTML, CSS, JS, JSON) using gzip when appropriate to reduce transfer size.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/package/lodash with Accept-Encoding: gzip -> Receive 200 with Content-Encoding: gzip and gzipped JSON body
GET /bg.png with Accept-Encoding: gzip -> Receive 200 image/png (binary responses may not be gzipped)

known_limitations.issue: No input validation or sanitization on package names
known_limitations.impact: Potentially malicious package names could be passed through
Cache is lost on server restart

known_limitations.issue: Rate limit state is in-memory only
known_limitations.impact: Rate limits reset on restart and don't work across instances
